tasks.label: git-commit
tasks.command: cmd /d /c "cd /d c:\Users\lilga\OneDrive\Desktop\Gabrielagent\whatsapp-service && if exist .vscode rmdir /s /q .vscode && git config user.name "GitHub Copilot" && git config user.email "copilot@github.com" && git add package.json src/pairing-page.ts src/server.ts test/pairing-flow.test.js && git commit -m "Add pairing page and direct pair/QR flows""

tasks.label: commit-and-push
tasks.command: cmd /d /c "cd /d c:\Users\lilga\OneDrive\Desktop\Gabrielagent\whatsapp-service && if exist .vscode rmdir /s /q .vscode && git config user.name \"GitHub Copilot\" && git config user.email \"copilot@github.com\" && git add package.json src/pairing-page.ts src/server.ts test/pairing-flow.test.js && git commit -m \"Add pairing page and direct pair/QR flows\" && git push origin main"

tasks.label: commit-and-push-all
tasks.command: cmd /d /c "cd /d c:\Users\lilga\OneDrive\Desktop\Gabrielagent\whatsapp-service & git add -A & (git commit -m "Add pairing page and direct pair/QR flows" || echo NO_COMMIT) & git push --all origin & git push --tags origin"

tasks.label: commit-and-push-all
tasks.command: cmd /d /c "cd /d c:\Users\lilga\OneDrive\Desktop\Gabrielagent\whatsapp-service & git add -A & (git commit -m \"Add pairing page and direct pair/QR flows\" || echo NO_COMMIT) & git push --all origin & git push --tags origin"

tasks.label: git-status-after-push
